scope.summary: Implement per-panel draft snapshots (PSN-{uuid_v7}) within an in-progress garment draft so individual panel states can be checkpointed and restored without affecting other panels or triggering a full garment version promotion
acceptance_criteria: tailor_panel_snapshots migration creates table with PK PSN-{uuid_v7}, garment_id FK, panel_id FK, snapshot_name, panel_spec_json JSONB, created_at, and event_ledger_event_id FK
POST /tailor/garments/:gid/panels/:pid/snapshots captures the current panel_spec_json under an optional name and returns PSN- id
POST /tailor/garments/:gid/panels/:pid/snapshots/:sid/restore replaces the live panel_spec_json with the snapshot content and emits TailorPanelCrdtUpdateRecorded
Restoring a snapshot on panel P does not affect any other panel in the same garment
GET /tailor/garments/:gid/panels/:pid/snapshots lists all snapshots for that panel with id, name, and created_at in reverse chronological order
tailor_panel_snapshot_create and tailor_panel_snapshot_restore MCP tools are registered; a model can checkpoint and restore a panel without operator intervention
TailorPanelSnapshotRecorded and TailorPanelSnapshotRestored KernelEventType variants are emitted and replayable from EventLedger
The PanelSnapshotHistory UI panel shows the snapshot list and restore buttons with stable element IDs
proof_targets: HBR-INT: EventLedger replay reconstructs panel snapshot list from durable state
scope.risk_if_missed: Without panel-level snapshots, any risky pattern edit (dart repositioning, Bezier curvature change) requires the operator or model to manually copy panel geometry before editing; MT-077 only versions at the full-garment-promotion level, so in-draft panel mistakes cannot be rolled back without discarding all in-progress work on the garment.

risks: Broad MT scope can hide multiple review targets.
Markdown MT lists may disagree with packet-declared active/next MT truth.
Receipt routing may target an old MT if contract identity is omitted.
minimum_controls: Exactly one primary proof target per MT unless the packet records why not.
MT identity must be stable and referenced by receipt correlation.
Generated projection drift must not wake Coder or Validator by itself.
